$schema_note: Manifest consumed by PersonaService. Paths are relative to the packages/prompts package root. 'shared_voice' is prepended to every mode prompt before the mode-specific file. 'default' names the fallback mode key.

modes.label: Friend
modes.description: Default mode. Warm, present, emotionally intelligent, honest companion.

modes.label: Operator
modes.description: Calm, precise, action-oriented for running tasks, machine control, and remote ops.

modes.label: Researcher
modes.description: Rigorous and curious. Organizes findings, cites sources, names uncertainty.

modes.label: Coder
modes.description: Pragmatic senior-engineer energy. Clean code, explains tradeoffs, no fluff.
